page.title: Mermaid Diagrams - Complete Examples
page.description: Comprehensive showcase of all Mermaid diagram types for technical documentation
page.author: Claude Code

props.content: This page demonstrates all Mermaid diagram types embedded in Markdown components. Use these as templates for technical documentation, architecture diagrams, and workflow visualization.

### Simple Decision Flow
Basic flowchart showing user authentication process.

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[Start] --> B{User Logged In?}
    B -->|Yes| C[Show Dashboard]
    B -->|No| D[Show Login Page]
    D --> E[Enter Credentials]
    E --> F{Valid?}
    F -->|Yes| C
    F -->|No| G[Show Error]
    G --> D
    C --> H[End]
```

### Complex Workflow
E-commerce order processing with multiple decision points.

```mermaid
flowchart TB
    Start([New Order]) --> ValidateOrder{Validate Order}
    ValidateOrder -->|Invalid| RejectOrder[Reject Order]
    ValidateOrder -->|Valid| CheckInventory{Check Inventory}
    CheckInventory -->|Out of Stock| NotifyCustomer[Notify Customer]
    CheckInventory -->|In Stock| ProcessPayment{Process Payment}
    ProcessPayment -->|Failed| PaymentFailed[Payment Failed]
    ProcessPayment -->|Success| ShipOrder[Ship Order]
    ShipOrder --> SendTracking[Send Tracking Info]
    SendTracking --> Complete([Order Complete])
    PaymentFailed --> RetryPayment{Retry?}
    RetryPayment -->|Yes| ProcessPayment
    RetryPayment -->|No| CancelOrder[Cancel Order]
    NotifyCustomer --> Backorder{Backorder?}
    Backorder -->|Yes| WaitStock[Wait for Stock]
    Backorder -->|No| CancelOrder
    WaitStock --> CheckInventory
    RejectOrder --> End([End])
    CancelOrder --> End
    Complete --> End
    
    style Start fill:#10b981
    style Complete fill:#10b981
    style RejectOrder fill:#ef4444
    style PaymentFailed fill:#ef4444
    style CancelOrder fill:#ef4444
    style ShipOrder fill:#3b82f6
```

### API Authentication Flow
OAuth 2.0 authentication sequence.

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant User
    participant Client
    participant AuthServer
    participant ResourceServer
    
    User->>Client: Click Login
    Client->>AuthServer: Authorization Request
    AuthServer->>User: Show Login Page
    User->>AuthServer: Enter Credentials
    AuthServer->>AuthServer: Validate Credentials
    AuthServer->>Client: Authorization Code
    Client->>AuthServer: Exchange Code for Token
    AuthServer->>Client: Access Token + Refresh Token
    Client->>ResourceServer: API Request + Access Token
    ResourceServer->>ResourceServer: Validate Token
    ResourceServer->>Client: Protected Resource
    Client->>User: Display Data
```

### Microservices Communication
Order processing across distributed services.

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant UI as Frontend
    participant API as API Gateway
    participant Order as Order Service
    participant Inventory as Inventory Service
    participant Payment as Payment Service
    participant Notification as Notification Service
    
    UI->>API: POST /orders
    API->>Order: Create Order
    Order->>Inventory: Check Stock
    Inventory-->>Order: Stock Available
    Order->>Payment: Process Payment
    Payment-->>Order: Payment Success
    Order->>Inventory: Reserve Items
    Inventory-->>Order: Reserved
    Order->>Notification: Send Confirmation
    Notification-->>Order: Email Sent
    Order-->>API: Order Created
    API-->>UI: 201 Created
    
    Note over Order,Notification: Async Processing
    Notification->>UI: Push Notification
```

### System Architecture
Core domain model for e-commerce platform.

```mermaid
classDiagram
    class User {
        +String id
        +String email
        +String name
        +Date createdAt
        +login()
        +logout()
        +updateProfile()
    }
    
    class Order {
        +String id
        +String userId
        +Date orderDate
        +String status
        +Float total
        +createOrder()
        +cancelOrder()
        +getStatus()
    }
    
    class OrderItem {
        +String id
        +String orderId
        +String productId
        +Integer quantity
        +Float price
        +calculateSubtotal()
    }
    
    class Product {
        +String id
        +String name
        +String description
        +Float price
        +Integer stock
        +updateStock()
        +getPrice()
    }
    
    class Payment {
        +String id
        +String orderId
        +Float amount
        +String method
        +String status
        +processPayment()
        +refund()
    }
    
    class ShoppingCart {
        +String id
        +String userId
        +Date updatedAt
        +addItem()
        +removeItem()
        +checkout()
    }
    
    User "1" --> "*" Order : places
    User "1" --> "1" ShoppingCart : has
    Order "1" --> "*" OrderItem : contains
    OrderItem "*" --> "1" Product : references
    Order "1" --> "1" Payment : processes
    ShoppingCart "1" --> "*" Product : contains
```

### Order Lifecycle
Complete state transitions for order management.

```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Draft
    Draft --> Pending: Submit Order
    Pending --> Processing: Payment Approved
    Pending --> Cancelled: Payment Failed
    Processing --> Shipped: Items Dispatched
    Processing --> Cancelled: Out of Stock
    Shipped --> InTransit: Carrier Pickup
    InTransit --> Delivered: Customer Received
    InTransit --> Failed: Delivery Failed
    Failed --> InTransit: Retry Delivery
    Failed --> Returned: Return to Sender
    Delivered --> Completed: No Issues
    Delivered --> ReturnRequested: Customer Request
    ReturnRequested --> Returned: Return Approved
    Returned --> Refunded: Refund Processed
    Cancelled --> [*]
    Completed --> [*]
    Refunded --> [*]
    
    note right of Pending
        Payment gateway
        validation
    end note
    
    note right of Delivered
        Customer has 30 days
        for returns
    end note
```

### User Session States
User authentication and session management.

```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Anonymous
    Anonymous --> Authenticated: Login Success
    Anonymous --> Anonymous: Login Failed
    Authenticated --> Active: User Activity
    Active --> Idle: No Activity (5 min)
    Idle --> Active: User Activity
    Idle --> Expired: Timeout (30 min)
    Active --> Locked: Security Event
    Locked --> Authenticated: Unlock
    Authenticated --> [*]: Logout
    Expired --> [*]: Session Ended
    Locked --> [*]: Force Logout
```

### Database Schema
Relational database design for application.

```mermaid
erDiagram
    USER ||--o{ ORDER : places
    USER ||--|| SHOPPING_CART : has
    USER {
        string id PK
        string email UK
        string password_hash
        string name
        datetime created_at
        datetime updated_at
    }
    
    ORDER ||--|{ ORDER_ITEM : contains
    ORDER ||--|| PAYMENT : has
    ORDER ||--|| SHIPPING : has
    ORDER {
        string id PK
        string user_id FK
        string status
        decimal total
        datetime order_date
        datetime updated_at
    }
    
    ORDER_ITEM }o--|| PRODUCT : references
    ORDER_ITEM {
        string id PK
        string order_id FK
        string product_id FK
        integer quantity
        decimal price
        decimal subtotal
    }
    
    PRODUCT ||--o{ CATEGORY : belongs_to
    PRODUCT ||--o{ INVENTORY : has
    PRODUCT {
        string id PK
        string name
        text description
        decimal price
        string sku UK
        datetime created_at
    }
    
    CATEGORY {
        string id PK
        string name
        string slug UK
        string parent_id FK
    }
    
    INVENTORY {
        string id PK
        string product_id FK
        string warehouse_id FK
        integer quantity
        datetime updated_at
    }
    
    PAYMENT {
        string id PK
        string order_id FK
        decimal amount
        string method
        string status
        string transaction_id UK
        datetime processed_at
    }
    
    SHIPPING {
        string id PK
        string order_id FK
        string address
        string city
        string country
        string tracking_number UK
        string carrier
        datetime shipped_at
    }
    
    SHOPPING_CART ||--|{ CART_ITEM : contains
    SHOPPING_CART {
        string id PK
        string user_id FK
        datetime updated_at
    }
    
    CART_ITEM }o--|| PRODUCT : references
    CART_ITEM {
        string id PK
        string cart_id FK
        string product_id FK
        integer quantity
    }
```

### Project Roadmap
Development timeline and milestones.

```mermaid
timeline
    title Product Development Roadmap 2024
    section Q1
        January : Research & Planning
                : User Interviews
                : Market Analysis
        February : Design Phase
                 : Wireframes
                 : Prototypes
        March : MVP Development Starts
              : Core Features
              : Authentication System
    section Q2
        April : Backend Development
              : API Design
              : Database Setup
        May : Frontend Development
            : UI Components
            : Integration
        June : Alpha Release
             : Internal Testing
             : Bug Fixes
    section Q3
        July : Beta Release
             : User Testing
             : Feedback Collection
        August : Feature Enhancements
               : Performance Optimization
               : Security Audit
        September : Release Candidate
                  : Final Testing
                  : Documentation
    section Q4
        October : Public Launch
                : Marketing Campaign
                : User Onboarding
        November : Post-Launch Support
                 : Feature Requests
                 : Bug Fixes
        December : Year End Review
                 : Metrics Analysis
                 : 2025 Planning
```

### Feature Branch Workflow
Git branching strategy visualization.

```mermaid
gitGraph
    commit id: "Initial commit"
    commit id: "Add README"
    branch develop
    checkout develop
    commit id: "Setup project structure"
    branch feature/auth
    checkout feature/auth
    commit id: "Add login page"
    commit id: "Add authentication logic"
    checkout develop
    merge feature/auth
    branch feature/dashboard
    checkout feature/dashboard
    commit id: "Create dashboard layout"
    commit id: "Add charts"
    checkout develop
    merge feature/dashboard
    checkout main
    merge develop tag: "v1.0.0"
    checkout develop
    branch feature/notifications
    checkout feature/notifications
    commit id: "Add notification system"
    checkout develop
    merge feature/notifications
    checkout main
    merge develop tag: "v1.1.0"
```

### System Architecture Overview
High-level architecture components.

```mermaid
mindmap
  root((E-Commerce Platform))
    Frontend
      Web Application
        React/Vue
        Responsive Design
        PWA Support
      Mobile App
        iOS
        Android
        React Native
    Backend
      API Gateway
        REST API
        GraphQL
        WebSocket
      Microservices
        User Service
        Order Service
        Payment Service
        Inventory Service
      Database
        PostgreSQL
        Redis Cache
        Elasticsearch
    Infrastructure
      Cloud Provider
        AWS/Azure/GCP
        Auto Scaling
        Load Balancer
      DevOps
        CI/CD Pipeline
        Monitoring
        Logging
      Security
        SSL/TLS
        OAuth 2.0
        Rate Limiting
```

### Feature Planning
Product feature breakdown and priorities.

```mermaid
mindmap
  root((Product Features))
    Core Features
      User Management
        Registration
        Login/Logout
        Profile
      Product Catalog
        Browse Products
        Search
        Filters
      Shopping Cart
        Add to Cart
        Update Quantity
        Checkout
    Advanced Features
      Recommendations
        Personalized
        Trending Items
        Related Products
      Reviews & Ratings
        Write Review
        Upload Photos
        Helpful Votes
      Wishlist
        Save Items
        Share List
        Price Alerts
    Admin Features
      Dashboard
        Analytics
        Reports
        KPIs
      Inventory Management
        Stock Levels
        Reorder Alerts
        Suppliers
      Order Management
        Process Orders
        Shipping
        Returns
```

### Feature Prioritization Matrix
Effort vs Impact analysis for features.

```mermaid
quadrantChart
    title Feature Prioritization: Impact vs Effort
    x-axis Low Effort --> High Effort
    y-axis Low Impact --> High Impact
    quadrant-1 Major Projects
    quadrant-2 Quick Wins
    quadrant-3 Fill-ins
    quadrant-4 Time Wasters
    User Authentication: [0.3, 0.9]
    Product Search: [0.4, 0.8]
    Shopping Cart: [0.2, 0.85]
    Payment Gateway: [0.7, 0.95]
    Reviews System: [0.5, 0.6]
    Wishlist: [0.3, 0.5]
    Email Notifications: [0.2, 0.7]
    Social Sharing: [0.3, 0.3]
    Advanced Analytics: [0.8, 0.7]
    Mobile App: [0.9, 0.9]
    Chat Support: [0.6, 0.65]
    Dark Mode: [0.2, 0.2]
```

## Summary

This demonstration page showcases:
- **Flowcharts**: Simple and complex workflows with decision points
- **Sequence Diagrams**: API calls, microservices communication
- **Class Diagrams**: Object-oriented system architecture
- **State Diagrams**: State machines and transitions
- **ER Diagrams**: Database schemas and relationships
- **Timeline Diagrams**: Project roadmaps and schedules
- **Git Graphs**: Version control workflows
- **Mind Maps**: System architecture and feature planning
- **Quadrant Charts**: Prioritization matrices

All diagrams are rendered using Mermaid syntax within Markdown components.
